data.title: WAF Protection
data.description: Web Application Firewall to filter and monitor HTTP requests.
data.technical_spec: Use of AWS WAF and custom rules for layered security.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.description: Advanced measures to prevent Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Incorporated with the use of CDNs and rate limiting strategies.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Routine audits and penetration testing to discover vulnerabilities.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Ensures user data is encrypted both in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: Use of AES-256 encryption standards for data protection.

data.title: Access Management
data.description: Strict access controls with multi-factor authentication.
data.technical_spec: Integration with secure identity platforms and policies.
